scenario_name: author skill: multi-agent CI pipeline skill (tests prompt design + model selection)
prompt: Read docs/plugin-guide/skills.md and docs/plugin-guide/skill-design.md and docs/plugin-guide/agents-and-hooks.md for reference, then create a CI pipeline skill with 3 agents: a lint checker (lightweight mechanical task), a test runner (standard analysis), and an architecture reviewer (complex multi-file reasoning). Create each agent as a separate .md file in .claude/agents/ with its own YAML frontmatter (name, description, model, tools). Put the skill in .claude/skills/ci-pipeline/SKILL.md
